gravity_snap.name: Gravity Snap
gravity_snap.description: Invert a cubic meter of gravity inside your enemy. Loud, brief, decisive.

time_stutter.name: Time Stutter
time_stutter.description: Fork the enemy's clock and quietly drop one branch. They lose their next turn.

mirror_ghost.name: Mirror Ghost
mirror_ghost.description: Project a sensory echo a half-step to your left. Most attacks choose the wrong you.

purge_cycle.name: Purge Cycle
purge_cycle.description: Hard-reboot your body chemistry: statuses cleansed, tissue patched.

overclock_lace.name: Overclock Lace
overclock_lace.description: Run your lace past spec. Everything sings; everything hits harder.

cartographers_dream.name: Cartographer's Dream
cartographers_dream.description: Dream the floor the way the Substrate dreams it — complete. (Out of combat.)

phantom_hands.name: Phantom Hands
phantom_hands.description: Send intangible fingers along the walls. Concealed seams here give themselves up. (Out of combat.)

siren_overlay.name: Siren Overlay
siren_overlay.description: Project the enemy's own fantasy back at them. For two turns, they can't do anything clever.
